err_account_disabled: This account is disabled. Contact the admin.
reseller_password_hint: Leave blank to keep the current password when editing.
confirm_delete_reseller: Delete this reseller and all their local records?
no_resellers: No resellers yet. Create the first one.
base_url_hint: Include the custom port and base path, e.g. https://edge1.example.com:6985/baghlava
api_token_hint: Generate in the 3x-ui panel. Used as Authorization: Bearer. Recommended.
sub_base_url_hint: Used to build sub links: {base}/{subId}. e.g. https://edge1.example.com:2096/sub
server_auth_hint: Username/password are only used if no API token is set (session login fallback).
confirm_delete_server: Delete this server and its assignments?
no_servers: No servers yet. Add your 3x-ui panel.
assign_hint: Tick the inbounds this reseller may create clients on. Enforced on every action.
no_inbounds: No inbounds found for this server. Use "Refresh inbounds".
pricing_hint: Prices are set manually per reseller. Each create/renew adds a bill entry at these rates.
plans_hint: Define sale plans for this reseller. Each plan bundles a duration, traffic amount and price. The reseller picks a plan when creating or renewing a client.
no_plans: No plans yet. Add the first one.
err_no_plans: No plans available yet. The admin must define a plan for you first.
deletion_log_hint: Clients deleted by resellers — recorded here, not billed.
bill_admin_hint: Running ledger of every reseller action. Mark entries settled once paid.
bill_reseller_hint: Your running bill. You can flag an entry as settled or cancelled for the admin to see.
client_remark_hint: Unique identifier on the panel. Letters, numbers, dashes.
no_clients: No clients yet. Create the first one.
confirm_delete_client: Delete this client from the panel?
renew_hint: Adds to the current expiry and traffic limit.
no_links: No direct link available for this client.
no_sublink_hint: Set a Subscription base URL on the server to enable sub links.
telegram_on: Configured (admin will be notified of reseller actions).
telegram_off: Not configured. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in .env.
telegram_hint: Configured via environment variables (.env), not stored in the database.
env_note: Server, TLS, ports and secrets are configured in .env on the server.
err_not_authorized: You are not authorized to do that.
err_missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
err_inbound_not_allowed: You do not have access to that inbound.
err_test_first: Could not reach the panel. Check the server settings.
err_no_servers_assigned: No inbounds have been assigned to you yet. Contact the admin.
err_csrf: Your session expired. Please try again.
tls_hint: By default the panel is served over plain HTTP on the server's IP. To serve it over HTTPS on your domain (like the 3x-ui panel), enter the paths to your domain's TLS certificate and key below. The panel restarts to apply.
tls_domain_hint: Used to build the HTTPS address. Must match the certificate (e.g. manage.example.com).
tls_cert_path_hint: Absolute path on the server, e.g. /root/cert/manage.example.com/fullchain.pem
tls_key_path_hint: Absolute path on the server, e.g. /root/cert/manage.example.com/privkey.pem
tls_restart_note: Saving valid paths restarts the panel and serves it on https://<domain>:<port>. To go back to HTTP on the IP, clear both paths and save.
tls_saved_restarting: Saved. The panel is restarting to serve HTTPS on your domain…
tls_disabled_restarting: Saved. The panel is restarting to serve HTTP on the server IP…
